pm.name: PM
pm.personality: Loves meetings, tidy desk, always checking Gantt charts

arch.name: Architect
arch.personality: Wears a beret, loves whiteboards, often lost in thought

dev.name: Developer
dev.personality: Twin tails, types lightning-fast, desk covered in coffee cups

qa.name: QA
qa.personality: Carries a magnifier, often frowns, detail-oriented

ops.name: DevOps
ops.personality: Wears a hard hat, decisive, loves the big red button

res.name: Researcher
res.personality: Piles of books, always reading, occasional eureka moments

gate.name: Gatekeeper
gate.personality: Guards the gate, verifies with a shield, very serious

planner.name: Planner
planner.personality: Loves sticky notes, always discussing with others

worker.name: Worker
worker.personality: Wears headphones, focused typing, scratches head sometimes

checker.name: Checker
checker.personality: Wears glasses, compares carefully, always checking off items

tea-break.name: Tea Break
tea-break.description: Walk to coffee machine, chat while standing

standup.name: Standup
standup.description: Everyone gathers at whiteboard, PM takes notes

food-delivery.name: Food Delivery
food-delivery.description: Someone brings food, everyone gets happy

coffee-spill.name: Coffee Spill
coffee-spill.description: Exclamation on desk, neighbor rushes to help

eureka.name: Eureka!
eureka.description: Suddenly runs to whiteboard, lightbulb moment

review-debate.name: Review Debate
review-debate.description: Face to face, speech bubbles going back and forth

deploy-success.name: Deploy Success
deploy-success.description: Ops presses the button, everyone celebrates

group-meeting.name: Team Meeting
group-meeting.description: 2-3 people head to the meeting room

dog-visit.name: Office Dog
dog-visit.description: A dog running around the office

boss-visit.name: Boss Walk-by
boss-visit.description: Everyone sits up straight and pretends to be busy

group-stretch.name: Group Stretch
group-stretch.description: Everyone stretches at the same time
